tif.tagspecs

Interface Taggable

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    TagExif_Interop, TagIFD_Baseline, TagIFD_DNG, TagIFD_Exif, TagIFD_Extension, TagIFD_GPS, TagIFD_Pointer, TagIFD_Private, TagIFD_Unknown

    public interface Taggable

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static int convertToInt(java.lang.Object val)
      Extracts the first numeric value from a metadata payload.
      java.lang.String getDescription()  
      DirectoryIdentifier getDirectoryType()  
      TagHint getHint()  
      int getNumberID()  
      default boolean isUnknown()  
      default java.lang.String translate(java.lang.Object val)
      Converts a raw tag value into a display string.
      static java.lang.String translateLightSource(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a standard light source or calibration illuminant code into a human-readable string.

    • Method Detail

      • getNumberID

        int getNumberID()
        Returns:
        the 16-bit numerical Tag ID (e.g., 0x0100 for ImageWidth)

      • getHint

        TagHint getHint()
        Returns:
        the expected data type or format hint for this tag

      • getDirectoryType

        DirectoryIdentifier getDirectoryType()
        Returns:
        the IFD where this tag is valid

      • getDescription

        java.lang.String getDescription()
        Returns:
        a human-readable name or description of the tag

      • isUnknown

        default boolean isUnknown()
        Returns:
        true if this represents a tag not explicitly defined in the specification

      • translate

        default java.lang.String translate(java.lang.Object val)
        Converts a raw tag value into a display string.
        Parameters:
        val - the value to convert
        Returns:
        a formatted string representation of the value, or an empty string if the value is null

      • convertToInt

        static int convertToInt(java.lang.Object val)
        Extracts the first numeric value from a metadata payload.

        Supports numeric wrapper types and primitive numeric arrays. Unsigned byte and short values are widened to preserve their full range. If the value cannot be converted, -1 is returned.

        Parameters:
        val - the value to evaluate
        Returns:
        the converted integer value, or -1 if unavailable

      • translateLightSource

        static java.lang.String translateLightSource(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a standard light source or calibration illuminant code into a human-readable string.

        This utility is also shared by EXIF_LIGHT_SOURCE, which indicates the specific capture white balance setting, as well as the DNG IFD_CALIBRATION_ILLUMINANT1 through to IFD_CALIBRATION_ILLUMINANT4 tags, which define the reference lighting environments used for factory sensor color profiling.

        Parameters:
        val - the raw metadata value
        Returns:
        the translated description, or the raw value if the code is unknown
